mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `expert_review_assignment` ( `batch_id`, `expert_user_id`, `expert_name`, `expert_org`, `expert_title`, `assigned_at`, `submitted_at`, `review_status`, `conflict_of_interest`, `is_valid`, `total_score`, `review_result`, `review_comment`, `created_at`, `updated_at` ) VALUES ( #{batchId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{expertUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{expertName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expertOrg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expertTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assignedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{submittedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{conflictOfInterest, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{isValid, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{totalScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{reviewResult, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewComment, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `expert_review_assignment` SET `batch_id` = #{batchId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `expert_user_id` = #{expertUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `expert_name` = #{expertName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `expert_org` = #{expertOrg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `expert_title` = #{expertTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `assigned_at` = #{assignedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `submitted_at` = #{submittedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `review_status` = #{reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `conflict_of_interest` = #{conflictOfInterest, jdbcType=TINYINT}, `is_valid` = #{isValid, jdbcType=TINYINT}, `total_score` = #{totalScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `review_result` = #{reviewResult, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `review_comment` = #{reviewComment, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} , `updated_at` = #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE `assignment_id` = #{assignmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
